title: sedum hirsutum subsp. wilczekianum
intro: Sedum hirsutum subsp. wilczekianum is a species of succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae, commonly known as hairy stonecrop. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sedum hirsutum subsp. wilczekianum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Sedum hirsutum subsp. wilczekianum is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or tincture.
